seeds.title: Re: Simplified Chinese Translation request - contract notes,
seeds.content:
Dear [客户称呼]

Thank you for reaching out with your detailed request for translating product marketing materials and website content into Simplified Chinese.

Our company has been a provider of professional language and integrated marketing services since 1997, with nearly three decades of experience. We have been a trusted partner for your team for years, initially handling translations and later expanding our collaboration to include services such as video transcription/subtitling, and the full-cycle design, print, and production of brochures. Beyond these, we also offer services like booth design/construction and customized corporate gifts.

To ensure consistency and quality, we utilize our independently developed ERP system, which includes a dedicated terminology database and translation memory.

Based on your requirements, we propose the following:

1. Scope of Services & Approach
We provide professional translation and Desktop Publishing (DTP) services. Regarding your inquiry about meta information (like page titles, descriptions, Alt text) and UI text (e.g., buttons), we will deliver a direct and accurate translation of the source content.
Note: This "direct translation" service focuses on accurate information transfer. It does not include creative localization or SEO/copywriting optimization aimed at enhancing search rankings or social media engagement. We can provide the translated base text should you wish to undertake optimization separately.

2. Product 相关部门 Materials (Adobe InDesign)
Service: An end-to-end service from translation to final InDesign file preparation.
Process:
- We perform the translation within our system and deliver a bilingual (EN-ZH) Word file for your review and confirmation of the text (excluding layout).
- Upon your approval of the text, we proceed with the InDesign typesetting and provide a PDF proof for your layout confirmation.
- We incorporate your feedback. Upon final sign-off, we deliver the complete, packaged INDD files.
Pricing:
- Translation & Proofreading: RMB 0.40 / source English word
- InDesign Typesetting & Production: RMB 150 / page
Revisions: Revisions during the above confirmation process are included. Changes requested after confirmation due to alterations in the English source material may incur additional charges.

3. Website Content (WordPress)
We offer two workflow options with different cost structures:
Option A: Using XLIFF/CSV Files (Recommended, Cost-Effective)
Process: You export the content from WordPress as XLIFF or CSV files. We translate and proofread the content within our ERP system (leveraging our databases for consistency) and return the translated files for you to import.
Pricing: Translation & proofreading only, at RMB 0.40 / source English word.
Option B: Direct Work in WordPress Admin
Process: To ensure terminology consistency, we first translate the content in our system, then copy/paste the approved translation into the specified pages within your WordPress admin.
Pricing: This option involves two cost components:
- Translation & Proofreading Fee: RMB 0.40 / source English word
- Content Upload Service Fee: Quoted separately based on the estimated time required, which depends on the complexity of the pages (number of modules, interactive elements, etc.). We can provide this estimate upon reviewing sample pages or a staging site.
Revisions: Revisions to the translation based on your feedback are included. Changes due to subsequent updates to the English source content will be charged additionally.

4. Proposal Summary & Terms
Initial Estimate: Based on the stated scope (~9,000 words for 10 product sheets; ~30 web pages, word count TBD), the estimated cost for the product materials is approximately RMB 5,100 (Translation: 9,000 words * 0.4 = RMB 3,600; Typesetting: 10 pages * 150 = RMB 1,500). The website translation cost will be finalized based on the confirmed word count and chosen workflow.
VAT: All prices quoted include 6% VAT.
Payment Terms: We can invoice your China office in RMB. Our standard payment term is within 30 days after delivery. For batch delivery of projects, we can issue a monthly statement of completed work along with the invoice for your convenience.

This proposal outlines our detailed approach based on the information provided. Should you have any questions, please feel free to reply to this email — we are happy to provide further clarification in writing.

We look forward to the possibility of working with you.

Best regards,
[发件人]

seeds.title: Vera收到请回复哦
seeds.content:
周经理您好

我是事必达的[发件人]，我们早在20012年就合作过，非常感谢您这么多年对我们的关照！

我看了星德科的官网，国内知名的医药公司基本都是我们的长期客户！

特整理了以下案例供您参考！

我们交大事必达创立于1997年，主要为进驻中国的500强外企、各国领事馆提供专业的资料翻译、大型会议同声传译、样册的图文设计印刷、多媒体译制等专业服务。

公司在业内率先实施ISO9001质量标准、并于全面实施了ERP数据库管理系统。

我们自主研发的业内最领先的互联网翻译平台，连通客户和译员，确保高效运营各类口笔译项目。

通过公司同仁近20余年的不断努力，公司保持业务的高速增长，为全球IT、金融、软件、航空、机电、建筑、化工、医药、咨询、零售等领域的外资企业长期合作，客户包括3M、欧莱雅、拜耳、某化工客户、渣打银行、飞利浦、ABB、阿尔斯通、GE等不同行业的跨国集团，品牌知名度始终居行业领先地位。

经过20余年的数据积累，我们拥有了业内最强大的行业翻译句对和词汇数据库，有力保证了翻译质量的稳定，这对许多跨国公司，是非常重要的。

近年来最热门的医疗行业，我们ERP系统也在医药领域做了大量的技术开发，大幅提升效率，缩短交稿周期，很好的控制好翻译的质量。

近2年我们已为众多企业完成FDA、GMP、GSP等认证58个项目，近1000万字的笔译服务，翻译内容包括产品技术要求、检验报告、研究资料、产品风险分析、临床报告、质量标准、生产流程、质量控制等12大类专业文件。

我们事必达专业医学翻译组，专注医疗行业翻译，解客户之所需，助力医疗行业多语言化翻译，随时响应您的需求。
